[[File:Sri_Yantra_Correct_Colors_Johari_1974.jpg|thumb|Correct usage of this is an example of a transparency opacity shift]]
For more information see here<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VxmtLjEm2vU</ref>

It's a phenomenon where you go from one recursive level of focus to another<ref name=":0" />

Probing excercise is an example.<ref name=":0" />

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Transparency opacity shift]][[Category:Servitors]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Transparency opacity shift]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
